nasb.text: You know that He appeared in order to take away sins; and in Him there is no sin.

esv.text: You know that he appeared in order to take away sins, and in him there is no sin.

cnv.text: 你們知道主曾經顯現，為要除掉罪，他自己卻沒有罪。

ccb.text: 你们知道，耶稣降世是为了除掉人的罪，祂自己并没有罪。

csbs.text: 你们知道，基督曾经显现，是为了除去罪孽；在他里面并没有罪。
